steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage uses “while” after describing public bathhouses in medieval towns. This word introduces a concession—an acknowledgment that these amenities were available mainly to town dwellers, not universally.

steps.title: Determine the function
steps.content:
The underlined portion concedes that not all people had access to public bathhouses—and choice C explicitly names this function.

Choices A, B, and
  • D misidentify what the passage is doing: A invents a popularity comparison
  • B confuses what's being limited
  • D posits unsupported research motivations
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
